summary: Batch Image Generation API testing complete. All 19 backend tests passed. Admin-only endpoints properly require authentication. Dry-run returns count/list/cost estimate correctly. Status endpoint returns all required progress fields. Static serving works for WebP images. No batch job currently running - system ready to accept new job.
critical_code_review_comments: Batch image generation endpoints well-implemented with proper admin auth via verify_admin_token dependency
In-memory job state (_image_job) tracks running/generated/failed/skipped/cost correctly
Duplicate job prevention works - returns started:false with appropriate message when job running
asyncio.create_task used correctly for background execution
asyncio.to_thread in ai_image_service.py prevents blocking event loop during OpenAI calls
Dry run returns list of missing recipes with slug/name for preview
context_for_next_testing_agent: Batch image generation API is fully functional. Status shows 137 recipes missing images at $5.48 estimated cost. No job currently running. Known images exist for: pizza-margherita-italy, risotto-alla-milanese-italy, coq-au-vin-france, spaghetti-alla-carbonara-italy, pad-thai-thailand, paella-valenciana-spain, moussaka-greece, hummus-lebanon, and others. Static images served via /api/recipe-images/{slug}.webp.

tests_executed.TestAdminAuthRequired: 4/4 passed - Both endpoints reject no token and invalid token with 401
tests_executed.TestDryRunEndpoint: 3/3 passed - Returns count, list, cost estimate; recipe structure correct; cost calculation accurate ($0.04×count)
tests_executed.TestStatusEndpoint: 2/2 passed - Returns all fields (running, total, generated, failed, skipped, cost, log); progress calculation correct
tests_executed.TestDuplicateJobPrevention: 1/1 passed - Checks if job running and reports correctly
tests_executed.TestStaticImageServing: 4/4 passed - WebP images served with image/webp content-type; 404 for nonexistent
tests_executed.TestRecipeImageURLInAPI: 3/3 passed - pizza-margherita, risotto, coq-au-vin all have image_url in API
tests_executed.TestAdminLogin: 2/2 passed - Correct password returns token; wrong password returns 401

status.note: No batch job has been run yet in current session
